mapper.select:
SELECT AVT_NO, AVT_CTG, AVT_NM, AVT_SAVE_DT, AVT_SAVE_NM, AVT_O_NM, AVT_DT, AVT_YN, AVT_PRICE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMP_AVT E WHERE E.AVT_NO = A.AVT_NO) AS POPULARITY FROM AVATAR A
AND AVT_CTG = #{cate}
ORDER BY POPULARITY DESC, AVT_DT DESC
ORDER BY AVT_PRICE ASC
ORDER BY AVT_PRICE DESC
ORDER BY AVT_DT DESC
mapper.update:
MERGE INTO EMP_AVT A USING DUAL ON (A.EMP_ID = #{empId} AND A.AVT_NO = #{avtNo})
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET OWN_AVT_YN = 'Y', OWN_AVT_DT = SYSDATE WHERE OWN_AVT_YN = 'N'
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (EMP_ID, AVT_NO, OWN_AVT_WEAR_YN, OWN_AVT_YN, OWN_AVT_DT) VALUES (#{empId}, #{avtNo}, 'N', 'Y', SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT A.AVT_NO, A.OWN_AVT_WEAR_YN , A.OWN_AVT_DT,B.AVT_NM,B.AVT_SAVE_DT, A.OWN_AVT_YN, B.AVT_SAVE_NM, B.AVT_O_NM FROM EMP_AVT A LEFT OUTER JOIN AVATAR B ON A.AVT_NO = B.AVT_NO WHERE A.EMP_ID = #{empId} AND A.OWN_AVT_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY OWN_AVT_WEAR_YN DESC, OWN_AVT_DT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE EMP_AVT SET OWN_AVT_WEAR_YN = 'N' WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(AVT_NO), 0) + 1 FROM AVATAR
INSERT INTO AVATAR (AVT_NO,AVT_NM,AVT_CTG, AVT_PRICE,AVT_YN,AVT_SAVE_NM, AVT_DT) VALUES (#{avtNo}, #{avtNm},#{avtCtg},#{avtPrice},#{avtYn},#{avtSaveNm}, SYSDATE)
